name: Moutsanas Family Phyllo Pie
servings: prep time: 5 minutes | cook time:45 minutes |serves 6

ingredients.item: large yellow onion, halved and thinly sliced

method: In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of the olive oil over medium heat. Add the onion, season with salt and pepper, and sauté until well softened, about 10 minutes. Add the cinnamon and sauté for another minute or two to incorporate the seasoning. Transfer to a large bowl and add the chicken, stirring to blend. Taste and adjust the seasoning.
Put the remaining 3 tablespoons olive oil in a small bowl. Using a little of that oil, lightly brush the bottom and sides of a 9-by-13-inch baking dish.

Stack the phyllo sheets on a work surface and trim them so that they measure about 10 by 14 inches, or about 1/2 inch larger than the baking dish on all sides. Layer 5 trimmed sheets of phyllo in the baking dish, brushing each layer with olive oil. Spread the chicken filling in an even layer, then top with the remaining 5 sheets of phyllo, brushing each layer with oil. You may not use all the oil.
Preheat the oven to 375°F. with a sharp knife, cut the pie into 15 squares. Bake, uncovered, until golden brown and crisp, about 45 minutes. Serve warm, not hot.
